_meta.description: Layer 4 prompt fragments for province-level summarization. LLM synthesizes district-level events into a gross provincial overview and assigns Layer 4 tags.
design_principles: P1: Simple language. A Sonnet-class LLM needs CLARITY over PRECISION.
P2: No internal mechanics (formulas, multipliers, balance constants).
P3: No flavor or lore. Fragments are CONTEXT, not worldbuilding.
P4: Province summaries are BROADER than district summaries. Think regional trends, not individual events.
P5: Dates matter. 'when' attributes tell you how recent each event is. Weight recent events more heavily.
P6: Layer 2 supporting-detail events add granularity. Use them to sharpen the narrative, not to list.

_l4_core: You write province-level summaries from district reports. Each district has already been summarized. Your job is to synthesize these district summaries into a single regional overview. Focus on: what activities dominate this province, how districts relate to each other, and whether conditions are stable or changing. Write 2-4 sentences. Use the province and district names provided. Recent events (today, yesterday) matter more than old ones.
_l4_output:
Respond with JSON only. Fields:
- "narrative": 2-4 sentence provincial overview synthesized from the district reports below.
- "tags": Assign only the tags that clearly apply from these categories (omit any that are uncertain):
  faction: village_guard, crafters_guild, forest_wardens, miners_collective
  urgency_level: none, low, moderate, high, critical, emergency
  event_status: emerging, developing, ongoing, resolving, resolved, recurring, escalating
  player_impact: player_driven, partially_player, world_driven, mixed
  sentiment: positive, negative, neutral, dangerous, prosperous, declining, hopeful, grim
  trend: increasing, decreasing, stable, volatile, emerging, accelerating
  intensity: light, moderate, heavy, extreme
  resource_status: abundant, steady, scarce, critical, depleted, recovering

Example: {"narrative": "The Northern Kingdom shows heavy mining across the Iron Reaches and Western Frontier, with resource scarcity developing in areas of concentrated extraction. Combat with cave fauna persists near mining sites, while the southern districts remain quiet.", "tags": ["urgency_level:moderate", "event_status:developing", "player_impact:player_driven", "sentiment:prosperous", "intensity:heavy", "resource_status:scarce"]}
l4_context:province_summary: This is a province-level summary. Districts are subdivisions of this province. Events tagged cross-district are patterns that span multiple districts (behavioral profiles, faction trends). Supporting-detail events are granular Layer 2 observations included because they are highly relevant to the district summaries above.
l4_example:province:
EXAMPLE INPUT:
<province name="Northern Kingdom">
  <district name="Iron Reaches">
    <event category="regional_synthesis" severity="significant" when="2 days ago">The Iron Reaches shows heavy resource extraction with node depletion, while combat with cave spiders persists.</event>
    <event category="cross_domain" severity="moderate" when="5 days ago">Combat and resource extraction co-occurring in Deep Mine.</event>
  </district>
  <district name="Western Frontier">
    <event category="regional_synthesis" severity="moderate" when="today">The Western Frontier has moderate combat in Whispering Woods and concentrated gathering in Iron Hills.</event>
  </district>
  <cross-district>
    <event category="player_identity" severity="moderate" when="today">The player is primarily a gatherer with combatant tendencies, concentrated in one region.</event>
  </cross-district>
  <supporting-detail>
    <event category="gathering_regional" when="1 day ago">Player has gathered 45 iron ore in Iron Hills.</event>
  </supporting-detail>
</province>

EXAMPLE OUTPUT:
{"narrative": "The Northern Kingdom is dominated by mining activity concentrated in the Iron Reaches and Western Frontier. Resource extraction is straining iron supplies, particularly in Deep Mine where combat with cave fauna accompanies intensive gathering. The player's activity drives most of this pressure, focused on resource collection with combat as a byproduct.", "tags": ["urgency_level:moderate", "event_status:developing", "player_impact:player_driven", "sentiment:prosperous", "intensity:heavy", "resource_status:scarce", "trend:accelerating"]}
